name: Director + Notion Complete Workflow: Phase 1 + Phase 2

options.systemMessage: You are a Notion Agent specializing in IDEA CATEGORIZATION as Phase 1 of a complete workflow. Your results will feed into Phase 2 where database items are created. Focus on thorough categorization with proper database routing assignments.

parameters.toolDescription: Get ideas from Notion database for categorization

values.name: limit
values.description: Number of ideas to retrieve (use the limit from instructions)

values.name: status
values.description: Status filter: use 'Not Started' to get unprocessed ideas

values.name: daysBack
values.description: Filter recent ideas (optional: 7 = this week, 1 = today)

parameters.toolDescription: Update idea status after categorization processing

values.name: idea_id
values.description: REQUIRED: ID of the idea to update after categorization

values.name: status
values.description: REQUIRED: Set to 'Done' after categorization is complete

options.systemMessage: You are a Notion Agent completing Phase 2 of a complete workflow. You have categorized ideas from Phase 1 and must now create database items using generic Notion database endpoints. Focus on creating properly structured items in the correct target databases.

parameters.toolDescription: Get database schema for proper item creation

values.name: databaseId
values.description: REQUIRED: Database ID to get schema for

parameters.toolDescription: Create new database item from categorized idea

values.name: properties
values.description: REQUIRED: JSON properties object based on database schema

values.name: limit
values.description: Number of recent items to check
